list.title: Pathways
list.description: Design care stages in the visual editor, publish when ready, and use each flow when you enroll and follow up patients.
list.newPathwayDialogDescription: Choose a name for this flow. Next, you can edit stages, alerts, and checklists on the following screen.
list.redirectWaitMessage: Pathway created. Opening the editor in a moment…
list.name: Name

detail.title: Pathway editor
detail.description: React Flow canvas — nodes become stages when published.

editor.pathwayNameRequired: Enter a pathway name before saving.
editor.draftHint: Save the draft before publishing. Publishing materializes stages for patients.
editor.stagePropsDescription: Edit the name, time-based alerts, patient message, checklist, and documents sent to the patient when they enter the stage (e.g. WhatsApp). Stays in the draft until you publish.
editor.selectNode: Click a node on the canvas.
editor.removeStageAria: Remove selected stage from the flow
editor.cannotRemoveLastStage: At least one stage is required in the flow.
editor.stageDocumentsTitle: Documents for the patient in this stage
editor.stageDocumentsDescription: PDFs and images from the clinic library are added to the bundle when the patient reaches this stage. Automatic delivery depends on your active integration (e.g. WhatsApp). Publish the pathway version for changes to take effect for patients.
editor.stageDocumentsUploadSuccess: {count, plural, =1 {1 file added to the stage.} other {{count} files added to the stage.}}

columnEditor.title: Treatment stages
columnEditor.description: Reorder columns with drag-and-drop. Order matches the dashboard Kanban after publish. Same data as the graph editor.
columnEditor.noPathways: No pathways yet. Create one under Journeys first.
columnEditor.listHint: Drag the handle to reorder. Save the draft, then publish to sync stages for patients.
columnEditor.checklistDescription: Operational items used in the patient detail for this stage.
columnEditor.cannotRemoveLast: At least one stage is required.

patient.title: Patient journey
patient.description: Current stage and transition to the next published stage.
patient.sameStage: Pick a stage different from the current one.
